introSection: Pulsar is a steel launched water shuttle roller coaster from Mack Rides located at Walibi Belgium in Wavre, Walloon Brabant, Wallonia, Belgium. Opened in 2016, it is the first Mack Rides prototype PowerSplash model and was the tallest roller coaster in Belgium until Kondaa opened in 2021.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Construction began in April 2015 with land clearing.

The ride debuted on 4 June 2016.

fullText:
Pulsar is a steel launched water shuttle roller coaster from Mack Rides located at Walibi Belgium in Wavre, Walloon Brabant, Wallonia, Belgium. Opened in 2016, it is the first Mack Rides prototype PowerSplash model and was the tallest roller coaster in Belgium until Kondaa opened in 2021.

Construction began in April 2015 with land clearing.

The ride debuted on 4 June 2016.
